context\n121\t\tmsg := wrapped.Error()\n122\t\tif !contains(msg, \"context message\") {\n123\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"wrapped error message should contain context, got: %s\", msg)\n124\t\t}\n125\t\tif !contains(msg, \"inner error\") {\n126\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"wrapped error message should contain inner error, got: %s\", msg)\n127\t\t}\n128\t\n129\t\t// Check that unwrapping returns the original error\n130\t\tif unwrapped := errors.Unwrap(wrapped); unwrapped != innerErr {\n131\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"unwrapped error should be the original error, got: %v\", unwrapped)\n132\t\t}\n133\t}\n134\t\n135\tfunc TestIsParseError(t *testing.T) {\n136\t\ttests := []struct {\n137\t\t\tname     string\n138\t\t\terr      error\n139\t\t\texpected contains a substring\n335\tfunc contains(s, substr string) bool {\n336\t\treturn len(s) >= len(substr) && (s == substr || len(s) > len(substr) && containsHelper(s, substr))\n337\t}\n338\t\n339\tfunc containsHelper(s, substr string) bool {\n340\t\tfor i := 0; i <= len(s)-len(substr); i++ {\n341\t\t\tif s[i:i+len(substr)] == substr {\n342\t\t\t\treturn true\n343\t\t\t}\n344\t\t}\n345\t\treturn false\n346\t}\n347\t\n348\tfunc TestNewValidationError(t *testing.T) {\n349\t\ttests := []struct {\n350\t\t\tname         string\n351\t\t\tfilePath     string\n352\t\t\tmessage *testing.T) {\n\tinnerErr := errors.New(\"inner error\")\n\twrapped := fmt.Errorf(\"context message: %w\", innerErr)\n\n\tif wrapped == nil {\n\t\tt.Fatal(\"wrapped error returned nil\")\n\t}\n\n\t// msg)\n\t}\n\tif !contains(msg, \"inner error\") {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"wrapped error message should contain inner error, got: %s\", msg)\n\t}\n\n\t// Check that unwrapping returns the original error\n\tif unwrapped := errors.Unwrap(wrapped); unwrapped != innerErr {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"unwrapped error should be the original error, got: %v\", unwrapped)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestIsParseError(t *testing.T) %d, want %d\", err.Line, tt.line)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif err.Column != tt.column {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Column = %d, want %d\", err.Column, tt.column)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif err.Expected != tt.expected tt.actual)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif err.Code() != tt.wantCode {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Code() = %q, want %q\", err.Code(), tt.wantCode)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif err.YAMLErrorType() != tt.wantErrorType !IsYAMLError(err) {\n\t\t\t\tt.Error(\"NewParseError() should implement YAMLError interface\")\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Verify it's recognized as a ParseError\n\t\t\tif !IsParseError(err) {\n\t\t\t\tt.Error(\"NewParseError() should be recognized as ParseError\")\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\n// Helper function to check if a string contains a substring\nfunc contains(s, substr string) bool {\n\treturn len(s) >= len(substr) && (s == substr || len(s) > len(substr) && containsHelper(s, substr))\n}\n\nfunc containsHelper(s, substr string) bool {\n\tfor i := 0; i <= len(s)-len(substr); i++ {\n\t\tif s[i:i+len(substr)] == substr {\n\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc TestNewValidationError(t *testing.T) {\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname
